hero.headline: Your notes, only yours.
hero.subtitle: Zero-Knowledge encryption. Create notes and folders protected by password. Not even we can read them.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.desc: Each note with its own password.

folders.title: Folders
folders.desc: Group notes with an extra layer of security.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge
zeroKnowledge.desc: The server never sees the content.

step2.title: Create notes
step2.desc: Title, content and a password per note.

step3.title: Unlock when you need
step3.desc: Enter the password and read or edit.

security.title: Security
security.text: Zero-Knowledge with AES. Your passwords never leave your device to decrypt. The backend only stores encrypted data.

register.title: Create account
register.acceptTerms: I have read and agree to the
register.mustAcceptTerms: You must accept the terms to continue.

dashboard.title: My notes
dashboard.createFirst: Create your first note or folder.

notes.enterPassword: Enter the password to unlock this note.
notes.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This action cannot be undone.
notes.moveWarning: The note will be moved to the selected folder. The note's password will not change.

folders.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this folder and all its notes?
folders.enterPassword: Enter the password to access this folder.

errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.

dataCollected.title: 1. Data Collected
dataCollected.passwordHash: Password hash (we never store passwords in plain text)
dataCollected.encryptedNotes: Note content (encrypted — we have no access to the content)
dataCollected.metadata: Creation date of account, notes and folders

purpose.title: 2. Purpose of Processing
purpose.text: Your data is used exclusively to provide the encrypted notes service: authentication, secure storage and synchronization of your notes across devices.

legalBasis.title: 3. Legal Basis (LGPD Art. 7)
legalBasis.text: The processing of your personal data is based on contract execution (Art. 7, V) and the consent of the data subject (Art. 7, I), collected at the time of registration.

zeroKnowledge.title: 4. Zero-Knowledge Architecture
zeroKnowledge.text: MyCriptoNote uses AES-256 encryption with keys derived from your personal password. The server stores only encrypted data and never has access to the original content of your notes. Even in the case of unauthorized access to the database, the content remains unreadable.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights (LGPD Art. 18)
rights.export: Export of your data in readable format (portability)
rights.delete: Complete deletion of your account and all associated data

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.text: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. When you request account deletion, all data is permanently removed from the database, including notes and folders.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.text: For privacy questions or to exercise your rights, contact us at: contact@mycriptonote.com

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By creating an account on MyCriptoNote, you agree to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.text: MyCriptoNote is an encrypted notes service with Zero-Knowledge architecture. It allows you to create, store and manage notes protected by individual passwords, where the server never has access to decrypted content.

account.title: 3. User Account
account.text: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and your note passwords. MyCriptoNote cannot recover lost note passwords due to the Zero-Knowledge architecture.

encryption.title: 4. Encryption and Responsibility
encryption.text: Each note is encrypted with a password defined by you. If you lose the password for a note, there is no way to recover the content. MyCriptoNote is not responsible for inaccessible data due to lost passwords.

responsibilities.title: 5. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.passwords: Keep your note and folder passwords in a safe place
responsibilities.content: Do not use the service to store illegal content

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.text: You can delete your account at any time. Account deletion permanently removes all associated data (notes, folders and personal information).

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: MyCriptoNote is provided 'as is'. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability of the service. Under no circumstances will we be liable for indirect damages arising from the use of the service.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.text: For questions about these terms, contact us at: contact@mycriptonote.com
